mapper.select: /** CmmtTermsDao.select */ select terms_type ,fn_cmm_get_code_nm('TERMS_TYPE', terms_type) as terms_type_nm ,begin_day ,required ,terms_cn ,possess_term_cd ,fn_cmm_get_code_nm('POSSESS_TERM', possess_term_cd) as possess_term_nm ,creator_id ,created_dt ,updater_id ,updated_dt from cmmt_terms where terms_type = #{termsType} and begin_day = #{beginDay} and required = #{required}

/** CmmtTermsDao.select */ select terms_type ,fn_cmm_get_code_nm('TERMS_TYPE', terms_type) as terms_type_nm ,begin_day ,required ,terms_cn ,possess_term_cd ,fn_cmm_get_code_nm('POSSESS_TERM', possess_term_cd) as possess_term_nm ,creator_id ,created_dt ,updater_id ,updated_dt from cmmt_terms where terms_type = #{termsType} and begin_day = #{beginDay} order by required desc

/** CmmtTermsDao.select_today */ select terms_type ,fn_cmm_get_code_nm('TERMS_TYPE', terms_type) as terms_type_nm ,begin_day ,terms_cn ,required ,possess_term_cd ,fn_cmm_get_code_nm('POSSESS_TERM', possess_term_cd) as possess_term_nm from cmmt_terms where terms_type = #{termsType} and begin_day = (select max(begin_day) from cmmt_terms where terms_type=#{termsType} and begin_day <= to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd')) order by required desc
